title: Razor Gusts
text: The wind cuts at banners and breath. Dungeon Score +1.
win: Push an enemy player back 1 space if they are on your realm ring.

title: Updraft
text: A sudden lift carries you upward. Dungeon Score -1.
win: Claim Hurricane and move 1 extra space.

title: Screaming Arch
text: The archway screams until courage cracks. Dungeon Score +2.
win: Gain 1 Mastery as well as Hurricane.
lose: Move back 4 spaces, discard 1 committed troop, and draw 1 Curse.

title: Silent Summit
text: At the top, the storm holds its breath. No score change.
lose: Move back 4 spaces and discard 1 committed troop.
